nodes.name: Green-throated sunbird
nodes.summary: The green-throated sunbird (Chalcomitra rubescens) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in the African countries of Angola, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Kenya, Nigeria, Rwanda, South Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, and Zambia. References

nodes.name: Chalcomitra
nodes.summary: Chalcomitra（Chalcomitra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Carmelite sunbird、Green-throated sunbird、Amethyst sunbird等7种鸟类。
